testcase.name: test_retailer_send_admin_list_thread
testcase.failure: tests/test_b2b_iteration_61.py:333: in test_retailer_send_admin_list_thread assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","to_retailer_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"message":"TEST_IT61 hello from retailer"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","subject"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"message":"TEST_IT61 hello from retailer"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_invalid_attachment_type_rejected
testcase.failure: tests/test_b2b_iteration_61.py:382: in test_invalid_attachment_type_rejected assert r.status_code == 400 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
